title: Scored-lead record (v5.4.0 pipeline stage 6 output — one record in scored_leads.json)
description: v5.4.0 Session 9 / Option Y. A scored_lead WRAPS a matched_lead by reference: it carries matched_lead.lead_id and the seam-derived scoring / classification / title-complexity / review output, plus optional parcel-display enrichment. matched_lead stays the immutable §19 output of record — scored_lead never mutates it. Enrichment is OPTIONAL per the R3(iii) decision (§13.14): scoring runs on distress signals from the staged pipeline; parcel-master enrichment (attribute bonus, display value, owner mailing) is a MODIFIER applied when present, absent without blocking. A lead is never dropped, blocked, or held for missing enrichment — enrichment_status records honestly whether the scored lead has parcel-master attributes attached.

scored_lead_id.description: Unique id for the scored_lead. Deterministic given the same matched_lead + same enrichment inputs.

lead_id.description: Back-reference to the matched_lead this scored_lead is derived from (the matched_lead is immutable; scored_lead does NOT mutate it).

primary_parcel_id.description: Carried from the matched_lead. null when the matched lead's parcel_resolution_status is UNRESOLVED / REVIEW_REQUIRED.

owner_name.description: Carried from the matched_lead. The §17.E placeholder when the matched lead is REVIEW_REQUIRED. Never a filer (§20 Check 12).

score.description: Lead score per domain/03_scoring_and_stacking.md, in [0, 100]. Computed by the retained score.compute_score over the seam-adapted stack.

score_reasons.description: Per-component score contributions (base / stack / recency / attribute bonuses).

deal_paths.description: Deal-path classifications per domain/04_deal_path_classifier.md. Computed by the retained classify.classify_deal_paths.

title_complexity_score.description: Title-complexity score per the retained build_leads._title_complexity (extracted into the seam).

pattern_set.description: Distinct stack-contributing patterns derived from matched_lead.signals via canonical_doc_types.json's lead_pattern. Drives stack-bonus and deal-path classification.

patterns.description: Ordered stack-contributing patterns (with duplicates) — drives stack_depth. The seam synthesizes one pattern entry per matched_lead.signals[].count occurrence so duplicate same-pattern instruments preserve their stack contribution (§18.E).

display_patterns.description: Patterns for the dashboard chips. Equal to `patterns` here in the Session-9 seam (no tired_landlord collapse adapter yet — staged-pipeline eviction handling is future work).

recent_flag.description: True when any matched_lead.signals[].latest_recorded_date is within the recency window (30 days) of the seam's as_of date — feeds score's recency bonus.

attributes.description: Parcel attributes — derived from enrichment when present, empty when not (R3(iii) enrichment-optional rule). Feeds score's attribute bonus + classify's branches.

review_flags.description: Review-queue flags per the retained review.evaluate_review_queue.

enrichment_status.description: ENRICHED when the seam attached parcel-master data (attributes + display fields); UNENRICHED when scoring ran on distress signals alone. Decoupled from parcel_resolution_status per §13.14 / R3(iii) — a UNENRICHED lead is still scored, still passes review, still reaches the dashboard.

evidence_ids.description: Union of all evidence ledger entry ids across the matched_lead's signals — carried forward unchanged.

source_ids.description: Distinct source_ids contributing to this scored_lead — carried forward from matched_lead.

primary_event_date.description: max(latest_recorded_date) across matched_lead.signals — the most recent event date powering the recency display.

match_confidence.description: Parcel-master match confidence. Null when matcher metadata is not available (synthetic / pre-enrichment).

doc_type_normalization.description: The doc-type bridge metadata used by the seam — registry canonical_doc_type values and their bridged monolith UPPERCASE normalized_doc_type values. Audit field; null when not computed.

parcel_display.description: OPTIONAL parcel-master snapshot used by the dashboard. Present iff enrichment_status is ENRICHED — the R3(iii) modifier path. Null when scoring ran without enrichment.

allOf.description: R3(iii) enrichment-optional rule — the parcel_display block is present iff enrichment_status is ENRICHED. A UNENRICHED scored_lead carries no parcel_display (the dashboard renders without one); an ENRICHED scored_lead's parcel_display is non-null. Either way the lead is scored and lives.
